name: Ribbon
description: Simple ribbon content block. If a second row contains an image, the decorate code moves that image to the section background.

fields.name: backgroundImage
fields.description: Optional image that is converted into a section background when authored as a second row.

usageNotes: The implementation replaces literal '0 %' text with a store variable placeholder. Avoid relying on that replacement in generated content unless store integration is explicitly desired.
ambiguityNotes: The authoring pattern for the optional background image is inferred from JS, not from formal docs.
